title: Winter Horrorland
description: An unforgiving winter world created by an ice wizard and a demon, can you survive the harsh climate?...
body:
An unforgiving winter world created by an ice wizard and a demon, can you survive the harsh climate?...

In this winter/horror modpack you must survive the cold temperature, the Primal Winter, The Graveyard, and most importantly... Herobrine, in the From The Fog mod.

This pack is mostly based around Asianhalfsquat's winter paradise video (without physics mod)

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aVNTGDMU8Wc&t=236s

This modpack is not finished and probably won't be for a while, please enjoy what it is currently until then!
